properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How I live for the moments Where I'm still in Your presence All the noise dies down Lord, speak to me now You have all my attention I will linger and listen I can't miss a thing

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, I know my heart wants more of You My heart wants something new So I surrender all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All I want is to live within Your love Be undone by who You are My desire is to know You deeper Lord, I will open up again Throw my fears into the wind I am desperate for a touch of heaven

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're the fire in the morning You're the cool in the evening The breath in my soul Oh, the life in my bones There is no hesitation In Your love and affection It's the sweetest of all

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: /: I'll open up my heart to You I'll open up my heart to You now So do what only You can Jesus, have Your way in me now :/ x3
